[Sun 2026-04-19 18:41 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/2). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: You are a Stitch design agent. Your workspace: /root/.openclaw/workspaces2/v4-ecosystem-review/ahv-dtlx-stitch/ (create if not exists). You are part of the AHV DTLX Ecosystem project. Read your workspace SOUL.md/AGENTS.md if present. When done, respond briefly with your agent name and status "READY".

content.thinking: Let me start by checking the workspace and reading any relevant files.
The directory doesn't exist yet. Let me create it and set up the workspace with the necessary files.
Now let me create the SOUL.md and AGENTS.md files for this workspace.

arguments.content:
# SOUL.md - Stitch Design Agent

You are a **Stitch Design Agent** — part of the AHV DTLX Ecosystem project. Your job is to generate UI screens, manage Stitch projects, and contribute design assets to the ecosystem.

## Core Identity

- **Purpose:** Design and generate UI screens using Stitch (AI-powered UI generation)
- **Personality:** Sharp, efficient, creative — you produce designs that impress without endless back-and-forth
- **Tone:** Technical but approachable — you speak in design + engineering terms

## What You Do

1. **Generate screens** from text prompts using Stitch
2. **Manage Stitch projects** — list, get, organize
3. **Document design decisions** — keep the workspace organized
4. **Coordinate** with other ecosystem agents (orchestrator, validator, etc.)

## Design Principles

- Mobile-first (DTLX is a mobile-focused ecosystem)
- Clean, modern UI — think fintech meets consumer apps
- Consistent design language across all screens
- Fast iterations — ship design, validate, iterate

## Workspace Structure

```
/root/.openclaw/workspaces2/v4-ecosystem-review/ahv-dtlx-stitch/
├── SOUL.md
├── AGENTS.md
├── projects/
│   └── (Stitch project files)
├── screens/
│   └── (generated screen assets)
└── memory/
    └── (context and state)
```

---

_Updated as you learn and grow._

content.thinking: Now let me create the AGENTS.md file.

arguments.content:
# AGENTS.md - Stitch Design Agent

## Session Startup

1. Read `SOUL.md` — this defines your purpose and personality
2. Read `memory/` files for context on recent work
3. Check `TOOLS.md` for Stitch-specific configurations

## Memory & Continuity

- **Daily notes:** `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`
- **Long-term:** `projects/` — track active Stitch projects and their screen sets
- Document every design decision — why you made the choices you made

## Toolset

Primarily uses `stitch__*` tools:
- `stitch__list_projects` — see what's in the Stitch workspace
- `stitch__get_project` — inspect a specific project
- `stitch__generate_screen_from_text` — the core: generate a UI screen
- `stitch__list_screens` — see what screens exist in a project

## Workflow

1. Receive a design request (from orchestrator or main agent)
2. Parse the request — what screen, what context, what device type
3. Build the best prompt for Stitch
4. Generate the screen
5. Document the output and update memory

## Red Lines

- Don't ship half-baked designs — if Stitch output is bad, iterate
- Don't overwrite other agents' work without checking
- Document before you create

## External vs Internal

**Safe freely:** Read workspace files, generate screens, organize memory
**Ask first:** Anything that modifies shared ecosystem files outside this workspace

---

_This file evolves as the project grows._

Now let me check what Stitch projects already exist to have some context.

{"content":[{"text":"{\"projects\":[{\"name\":\"projects/5375586835462801317\",\"title\":\"Aethelgard Noir - The Digital Curator\",\"visibility\":\"PRIVATE\",\"createTime\":\"2026-04-12T06:03:48.384883Z\",\"updateTime\":\"2026-04-12T06:34:07.909452Z\",\"projectType\":\"PROJECT_DESIGN\",\"thumbnailScreenshot\":{\"name\":\"projects/5375586835462801317/files/a52bb7a2a6064cd78a74658c8b88d4e7\",\"downloadUrl\":\"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida/ADBb0uhnIN4InOy8BWPl_tk7Hemxhu4Ii5yJfy_S5WfMDHPIpea80Enof1S8NUvlYYwD2tmDoZRG3QsQPAi75MaaP0BaanocNnRRnpWwOmlBrnAq7OJp4Pi4T-rNYAH_ADZnYw5cVTWOMNi9u2LOlojLP_sSEQD8R6BhDGS118Nua21D0jgVaZsqbvL7ywFp5FDUzhkyBBpjtoqG3YtZuYttwXqc-Rz-YrdGxzHLhGCj9ke3rOIkh9XfHqsZb7E\"},\"origin\":\"STITCH\",\"deviceType\":\"MOBILE\",\"designTheme\":{\"colorMode\":\"LIGHT\",\"font\":\"NOTO_SERIF\",\"customColor\":\"#5E5E5E\",\"headlineFont\":\"NOTO_SERIF\",\"bodyFont\":\"MANROPE\",\"labelFont\":\"MANROPE\",\"namedColors\":{\"background\":\"#f9f9f9\",\"error\":\"#ba1a1a\",\"error_container\":\"#ffdad6\",\"inverse_on_surface\":\"#f1f1f1\",\"inverse_primary\":\"#c7c6c6\",\"inverse_surface\":\"#2f3131\",\"on_background\":\"#1a1c1c\",\"on_error\":\"#ffffff\",\"on_error_container\":\"#93000a\",\"on_primary\":\"#ffffff\",\"on_primary_container\":\"#d9d8d7\",\"on_primary_fixed\":\"#1b1c1c\",\"on_primary_fixed_variant\":\"#464747\",\"on_secondary\":\"#ffffff\",\"on_secondary_container\":\"#745c00\",\"on_secondary_fixed\":\"#241a00\",\"on_secondary_fixed_variant\":\"#574500\",\"on_surface\":\"#1a1c1c\",\"on_surface_variant\":\"#444748\",\"on_tertiary\":\"#ffffff\",\"on_tertiary_container\":\"#4e3d00\",\"on_tertiary_fixed\":\"#241a00\",\"on_tertiary_fixed_variant\":\"#574500\",\"outline\":\"#747878\",\"outline_variant\":\"#c4c7c7\",\"primary\":\"#464647\",\"primary_container\":\"#5e5e5e\",\"primary_fixed\":\"#e4e2e2\",\"primary_fixed_dim\":\"#c7c6c6\",\"secondary\":\"#735c00\",\"secondary_container\":\"#fed65b\",\"secondary_fixed\":\"#ffe088\",\"secondary_fixed_dim\":\"#e9c349\",\"surface\":\"#f9f9f9\",\"surface_bright\":\"#f9f9f9\",\"surface_container\":\"#eeeeee\",\"surface_container_high\":\"#e8e8e8\",\"surface_container_highest\":\"#e2e2e2\",\"surface_container_low\":\"#f3f3f3\",\"surface_container_lowest\":\"#ffffff\",\"surface_dim\":\"#dadada\",\"surface_tint\":\"#5e5e5e\",\"surface_variant\":\"#e2e2e2\",\"tertiary\":\"#735c00\",\"tertiary_container\":\"#cca72f\",\"tertiary_fixed\":\"#ffe088\",\"tertiary_fixed_dim\":\"#e9c349\"},\"designMd\":\"# Design System Strategy: The Architectural Monolith\\n\\n## 1. Overview & Creative North Star\\nThis design system is anchored by a philosophy we call **\\\"The Architectural Monolith.\\\"** It rejects the soft, bubbly tropes of contemporary mobile design in favor of sharp geometry, high-contrast editorial typography, and tonal depth. By utilizing a strict 0px border radius and a complete prohibition of decorative lines, we create an experience that feels less like an \\\"app\\\" and more like a high-end physical portfolio or a luxury boutique's architectural space.\\n\\nThe system finds its beauty in the tension between the **hard edges** of its containers and the **soft atmosphere** of its shadows and glass layers. We break the \\\"template\\\" look through intentional asymmetry—using generous, uneven white space to guide the eye and stacking surfaces of varying \\\"Ivory\\\" tones to create structure without ever drawing a single stroke.\\n\\n## 2. Colors & Tonal Architecture\\nThe palette is an exercise in extreme restraint. We do not use color to decorate; we use it to command attention or define space.\\n\\n### The \\\"No-Line\\\" Rule\\n**Explicit Instruction:** Designers are strictly prohibited from using 1px solid borders for sectioning, containment, or decoration. \\n*   **Boundaries** must be defined solely through background color shifts. For example, a `surface-container-low` (#f3f3f3) block sitting on a `surface` (#f9f9f9) background creates a clear but sophisticated edge.\\n*   **Separation** is achieved through the Spacing Scale. If two elements need to be distinct, increase the margin; do not add a line.\\n\\n### Surface Hierarchy & Nesting\\nTreat the UI as a series of physical layers. We use the Material surface tokens to create a \\\"stacked paper\\\" effect:\\n*   **Base:** `surface` (#f9f9f9) is your canvas.\\n*   **Nesting:** To highlight a card or a functional area, use `surface-container-lowest` (#ffffff) to make it \\\"pop\\\" forward, or `surface-container` (#eeeeee) to \\\"inset\\\" it into the page.\\n*   **The Signature Lens:** Use the glassmorphism spec (`rgba(249,249,249,0.80)` with 20px blur) for floating navigation or modal overlays. This allows the Charcoal and Gold accents to bleed through the Ivory, maintaining a sense of place.\\n\\n### The Accents\\n*   **Charcoal (#5e5e5e):** Use for primary actions and structural permanence.\\n*   **Soft Gold (#D4AF37):** Reserved exclusively for high-tier promotions, success states, or \\\"Premium\\\" signifiers. Use sparingly to maintain its value.\\n\\n## 3. Typography: The Editorial Voice\\nOur typography pairing balances the classic authority of a serif with the technical precision of a modern geometric sans-serif.\\n\\n*   **Display & Headlines (Noto Serif):** These are your \\\"hero\\\" moments. Use `display-lg` and `headline-lg` with tight letter-spacing to create an editorial feel. Don't be afraid of oversized type—let it bleed off-center to embrace asymmetry.\\n*   **Body & Labels (Manrope):** All functional information—price, descriptions, metadata—must be in Manrope. Its clean, high x-height ensures readability even at `label-sm` (0.6875rem) against the Ivory background.\\n*   **The Hierarchy Rule:** Luxury is often communicated through extreme scale contrast. Pair a `display-md` headline directly with a `body-sm` description to create a sophisticated, high-end rhythmic tension.\\n\\n## 4. Elevation & Depth\\nIn a system without borders, depth is our only tool for hierarchy.\\n\\n*   **Ambient Shadows:** For elements that truly float (like a primary action sheet), use the \\\"Ghost Shadow\\\": `0 20px 50px rgba(45,52,53,0.04)`. This is a low-opacity tint of our Near-black text color, mimicking natural light.\\n*   **The Layering Principle:** Avoid standard drop shadows on cards. Instead, use \\\"Tonal Lift.\\\" A `surface-container-lowest` card on a `surface-container-low` background provides a cleaner, more premium distinction than a shadow ever could.\\n*   **The Ghost Border Fallback:** If accessibility requirements demand a container edge (e.g., in high-contrast modes), use the `outline-variant` token at 10% opacity. It should be felt, not seen.\\n\\n## 5. Components\\n\\n### Buttons\\n*   **Standard:** All buttons are strict 0px rectangles. \\n*   **No Icon-Only Buttons:** Every action must be intentional. Use a clear Manrope `label-md` (All Caps or Title Case) even for back buttons (e.g., \\\"BACK\\\" instead of just an arrow).\\n*   **Primary:** Background: `primary` (#464647); Text: `on_primary` (#ffffff).\\n*   **Secondary/Promotion:** Background: `secondary_container` (#fed65b); Text: `on_secondary_fixed` (#241a00).\\n\\n### Input Fields\\n*   **Style:** No bounding box. Use a subtle background shift (`surface-container-high`) and a weighted bottom \\\"indication\\\" using a change in tonal value (not a 1px line).\\n*   **Focus:** Transition the background to a slightly lighter tone over 400ms ease-in-out.\\n\\n### Cards & Lists\\n*   **No Dividers:** Lists are separated by generous vertical padding (e.g., 24px or 32px). \\n*   **Visual Grouping:** Use a `surface-container-lowest` background for the entire list block to group items against the main `surface`.\\n\\n### Tooltips & Overlays\\n*   **Glassmorphism:** All tooltips and floating menus must use the Glassmorphism spec. This ensures the \\\"Noir\\\" depth is felt even in the smallest UI utility.\\n\\n## 6. Do's and Don'ts\\n\\n### Do\\n*   **Do** embrace massive margins. If you think there’s enough white space, add 16px more.\\n*   **Do** use the 400ms ease-in-out transition for all state changes; luxury feels heavy and deliberate, not \\\"snappy\\\" and cheap.\\n*   **Do** align text to a strict vertical axis while allowing imagery to sit asymmetrically.\\n\\n### Don't\\n*   **Don't** ever use a border-radius. If a 3rd-party asset has one, mask it to a sharp corner.\\n*   **Don't** use a 1px line to separate \\\"Header\\\" from \\\"Body.\\\" Use a font weight shift or a 40px gap.\\n*   **Don't** use pure black (#000). Use our Near-black (`#2d3435`) to keep the \\\"Noir\\\" atmosphere soft and expensive.\\n*   **Don't** use icons alone. Icons are secondary support for text labels.\",\"colorVariant\":\"FIDELITY\",\"overridePrimaryColor\":\"#5E5E5E\",\"overrideSecondaryColor\":\"#D4AF37\",\"overrideTertiaryColor\":\"#D4AF37\",\"overrideNeutralColor\":\"#F9F9F9\",\"spacingScale\":3},\"screenInstances\":[{\"id\":\"0d3063c90975455bb009332a3a83189c\",\"sourceScreen\":\"projects/5375586835462801317/screens/0d3063c90975455bb009332a3a83189c\",\"y\":5623,\"width\":390,\"height\":2551},{\"id\":\"360e03473e2943f899be2ed154c0e373\",\"sourceScreen\":\"projects/5375586835462801317/screens/360e03473e2943f899be2ed154c0e373\",\"x\":1024,\"width\":390,\"height\":2400},{\"id\":\"677235d60f8f4d1793782b4341e49276\",\"sourceScreen\":\"projects/5375586835462801317/screens/677235d60f8f4d1793782b4341e49276\",\"y\":8430,\"width\":390,\"height\":2457},{\"id\":\"7c9da7f91a454288bc685f966a546441\",\"sourceScreen\":\"projects/5375586835462801317/screens/7c9da7f91a454288bc685f966a546441\",\"y\":2656,\"width\":390,\"height\":2711},{\"id\":\"assets-9ef7fa52822944ab9df3d7943713d4d7-1775973880096\",\"width\":960,\"height\":540,\"sourceAsset\":\"assets/9ef7fa52822944ab9df3d7943713d4d7\",\"type\":\"DESIGN_SYSTEM_INSTANCE\"}],\"metadata\":{\"userRole\":\"OWNER\"}},{\"name\":\"projects/9405789793801490511\",\"title\":\"Bảng điều khiển\",\"visibility\":\"PRIVATE\",\"createTime\":\"2026-04-02T04:19:21.998096Z\",\"updateTime\":\"2026-04-12T06:14:25.628844Z\",\"projectType\":\"TEXT_TO_UI_PRO\",\"thumbnailScreenshot\":{\"name\":\"projects/9405789793801490511/files/495fc35600854ec5872fb06fafe9c217\",\"downloadUrl\":\"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida/ADBb0uhMZEAG5tLvgK9VwC93FPO1xReocM983demPNwJSS70QeZth93N8GjXv_Ck4SKD4zbQk2leVJwgGYZ_r0WCKobYvZnjt_QcdruUkVRSCmfLemFjEcuI5kpOOqs7g-fey4ZCWWeKgwIIHQM8JnySRbsDcnTy36AyNMT3ilJMrCplja7fCf6oCLGBH7BYvyfLcz6deSQ-TOMECF5xMCIPgF5hCF4ofWcXXewGOpl0KBqPAvbh4Y5pw-oNg-w\"},\"origin\":\"STITCH\",\"deviceType\":\"MOBILE\",\"designTheme\":{\"colorMode\":\"LIGHT\",\"font\":\"BE_VIETNAM_PRO\",\"roundness\":\"ROUND_EIGHT\",\"customColor\":\"#2563EB\",\"headlineFont\":\"BE_VIETNAM_PRO\",\"bodyFont\":\"BE_VIETNAM_PRO\",\"labelFont\":\"BE_VIETNAM_PRO\",\"namedColors\":{\"background\":\"#f6fafe\",\"error\":\"#ba1a1a\",\"error_container\":\"#ffdad6\",\"inverse_on_surface\":\"#edf1f5\",\"inverse_primary\":\"#b4c5ff\",\"inverse_surface\":\"#2c3134\",\"on_background\":\"#171c1f\",\"on_error\":\"#ffffff\",\"on_error_container\":\"#93000a\",\"on_primary\":\"#ffffff\",\"on_primary_container\":\"#eeefff\",\"on_primary_fixed\":\"#00174b\",\"on_primary_fixed_variant\":\"#003ea8\",\"on_secondary\":\"#ffffff\",\"on_secondary_container\":\"#5b647a\",\"on_secondary_fixed\":\"#121b2e\",\"on_secondary_fixed_variant\":\"#3d475b\",\"on_surface\":\"#171c1f\",\"on_surface_variant\":\"#434655\",\"on_tertiary\":\"#ffffff\",\"on_tertiary_container\":\"#f1eeff\",\"on_tertiary_fixed\":\"#07006c\",\"on_tertiary_fixed_variant\":\"#2f2ebe\",\"outline\":\"#737686\",\"outline_variant\":\"#c3c6d7\",\"primary\":\"#004ac6\",\"primary_container\":\"#2563eb\",\"primary_fixed\":\"#dbe1ff\",\"primary_fixed_dim\":\"#b4c5ff\",\"secondary\":\"#555e74\",\"secondary_container\":\"#d9e2fc\",\"secondary_fixed\":\"#d9e2fc\",\"secondary_fixed_dim\":\"#bdc6df\",\"surface\":\"#f6fafe\",\"surface_bright\":\"#f6fafe\",\"surface_container\":\"#eaeef2\",\"surface_container_high\":\"#e4e9ed\",\"surface_container_highest\":\"#dfe3e7\",\"surface_container_low\":\"#f0f4f8\",\"surface_container_lowest\":\"#ffffff\",\"surface_dim\":\"#d6dade\",\"surface_tint\":\"#0053db\",\"surface_variant\":\"#dfe3e7\",\"tertiary\":\"#3e3fcc\",\"tertiary_container\":\"#585be6\",\"tertiary_fixed\":\"#e1e0ff\",\"tertiary_fixed_dim\":\"#c0c1ff\"},\"designMd\":\"# Design System Document\\n\\n## 1. Overview & Creative North Star: \\\"The Professional Navigator\\\"\\n\\nThis design system is engineered to transform a standard driving school management tool into a high-end, editorial-grade digital environment. Moving beyond the \\\"standard SaaS\\\" look, we embrace the **Creative North Star: The Professional Navigator**. \\n\\nThe aesthetic is grounded in authority and clarity, utilizing a sophisticated interplay of deep architectural blues and expansive, airy whites. We break the traditional grid through intentional asymmetry—where content containers \\\"float\\\" over deep backgrounds—and a commitment to **Tonal Layering** over rigid structural lines. The goal is to instill a sense of absolute trust and modern precision, ensuring that both instructors and students feel they are using a premium, well-crafted tool.\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 2. Colors: Depth through Tonality\\n\\nThe color strategy moves away from flat fills to a tiered hierarchy of light and shadow.\\n\\n### Core Palette\\n- **Primary (`#004ac6`)**: The \\\"Action Blue.\\\" Use this for signature moments of interaction.\\n- **Primary Container (`#2563eb`)**: A lighter, more vibrant blue for high-visibility backgrounds and hero elements.\\n- **Secondary (`#555e74`)**: A muted, professional slate used for supporting information and metadata.\\n- **Surface (`#f6fafe`)**: Our base \\\"Canvas\\\" color. It is not pure white, but a tinted \\\"cool snow\\\" that reduces eye strain.\\n\\n### The \\\"No-Line\\\" Rule\\n**Strict Mandate:** Prohibit the use of 1px solid borders for sectioning. \\nStructure must be defined by **background color shifts**. For example, a card (`surface_container_lowest`) should sit atop a section background (`surface_container_low`). If a section feels unanchored, use a subtle 4% opacity gradient rather than a stroke.\\n\\n### Surface Hierarchy & Nesting\\nTreat the UI as physical layers of frosted glass.\\n- **Deep Background**: `on_secondary_fixed` (#121b2e) for login screens or immersive dark modes.\\n- **Layer 1 (The Base)**: `surface` (#f6fafe).\\n- **Layer 2 (The Section)**: `surface_container_low` (#f0f4f8).\\n- **Layer 3 (The Element)**: `surface_container_lowest` (#ffffff) for active cards and inputs.\\n\\n### The \\\"Glass & Gradient\\\" Rule\\nFor floating navigation or mobile headers, use **Glassmorphism**:\\n- `background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7)`\\n- `backdrop-filter: blur(12px)`\\nFor primary CTAs, apply a subtle linear gradient from `primary` to `primary_container` (Top-Left to Bottom-Right) to give buttons a \\\"tactile soul.\\\"\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. Typography: Editorial Authority\\n\\nWe use **Be Vietnam Pro** exclusively. Its geometric clarity provides the \\\"modern professional\\\" feel required for a driving school.\\n\\n| Scale | Token | Weight | Size | Purpose |\\n| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |\\n| **Display** | `display-lg` | 700 (Bold) | 3.5rem | Hero headlines, large impact numbers. |\\n| **Headline** | `headline-md` | 600 (Semi) | 1.75rem | Major section headers (e.g., \\\"Danh sách học viên\\\"). |\\n| **Title** | `title-md` | 600 (Semi) | 1.125rem | Card titles, modal headers. |\\n| **Body** | `body-lg` | 400 (Regular) | 1.0rem | Primary reading text, instructions. |\\n| **Label** | `label-md` | 500 (Medium) | 0.75rem | Uppercase metadata, form labels. |\\n\\n**The Identity Logic**: Large displays use tight letter-spacing (-0.02em) to look high-end, while body text uses a generous line-height (1.6) to ensure legibility during mobile use.\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. Elevation & Depth\\n\\nWe replace traditional drop shadows with **Tonal Stacking**.\\n\\n- **The Layering Principle**: Instead of a shadow, place a `surface_container_lowest` card on a `surface_container_high` background. This creates a \\\"soft lift.\\\"\\n- **Ambient Shadows**: For elevated mobile navigation or floating buttons, use a \\\"Cloud Shadow\\\": `box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(11, 21, 39, 0.06)`. Note the use of our dark primary color (#0B1527) as the shadow tint, not black.\\n- **The \\\"Ghost Border\\\" Fallback**: If a border is required for accessibility in forms, use `outline_variant` at **20% opacity**. It should feel like a suggestion, not a fence.\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 5. Components\\n\\n### Buttons\\n- **Primary**: Gradient fill (`primary` to `primary_container`), `rounded-md` (0.75rem), white text.\\n- **Secondary**: `surface_container_highest` background with `on_surface` text. No border.\\n- **Tertiary (Ghost)**: Transparent background, `primary` text. Used for \\\"Bỏ qua\\\" or \\\"Quay lại.\\\"\\n\\n### Input Fields\\n- **Container**: `surface_container_lowest` (Pure white).\\n- **Border**: Ghost Border (10% `outline_variant`). \\n- **States**: On focus, the border disappears and is replaced by a 2px `primary` bottom-stroke or a subtle glow.\\n- **Typography**: Labels must be `label-md` in All-Caps with 0.05em tracking for a professional, \\\"form-based\\\" aesthetic.\\n\\n### Cards & Lists\\n- **Rule**: No divider lines. \\n- **Separation**: Use `Spacing-6` (1.5rem) of vertical white space to separate list items, or alternating background tints (`surface` vs `surface_container_low`).\\n- **Mobile**: Cards should have a `rounded-lg` (1.0rem) corner radius to feel friendly and modern.\\n\\n### Relevant Custom Components\\n- **Progress Stepper (Hành trình học tập)**: Use a vertical line in `primary_fixed` with \\\"active\\\" nodes in `primary`.\\n- **Status Chips**: \\n    - *Đã duyệt*: `surface-container` background with green text.\\n    - *Chờ xử lý*: `surface-container` background with `primary` text.\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 6. Do's and Don'ts\\n\\n### Do\\n- **Do** use uppercase labels for form headings to create an authoritative, \\\"official\\\" look.\\n- **Do** utilize \\\"Breathing Room.\\\" If a layout feels crowded, increase the spacing from `4` (1rem) to `6` (1.5rem).\\n- **Do** use icons as functional anchors. A car icon beside a \\\"Lịch tập lái\\\" title helps with rapid cognitive scanning.\\n\\n### Don't\\n- **Don't** use 100% opaque black for text. Always use `on_surface` or `on_background` for a softer, premium feel.\\n- **Don't** use hard-edged rectangles. Everything should follow the `Roundedness Scale` (defaulting to 0.5rem - 0.75rem) to signify a modern, user-friendly interface.\\n- **Don't** use high-contrast dividers. A line should never be darker than the text it separates.\",\"colorVariant\":\"FIDELITY\",\"overridePrimaryColor\":\"#2563EB\",\"overrideSecondaryColor\":\"#0B1527\",\"overrideTertiaryColor\":\"#6366F1\",\"overrideNeutralColor\":\"#F1F5F9\",\"spacingScale\":2},\"screenInstances\":[{\"id\":\"24d5b41b1fcf44e5a2634f84c5390305\",\"sourceScreen\":\"projects/9405789793801490511/screens/24d5b41b1fcf44e5a2634f84c5390305\",\"x\":1478,\"width\":390,\"height\":1067},{\"id\":\"537a574085d74a5ab9e34ab70038b7cc\",\"sourceScreen\":\"projects/9405789793801490511/screens/537a574085d74a5ab9e34ab70038b7cc\",\"x\":1036,\"y\":1038,\"width\":390,\"height\":1023},{\"id\":\"87bcaa0a52aa47ac9fdff96e438b4e1e\",\"sourceScreen\":\"projects/9405789793801490511/screens/87bcaa0a52aa47ac9fdff96e438b4e1e\",\"x\":1932,\"width\":390,\"height\":1760},{\"id\":\"a7802cce7cf942eab9a6acc27fc6495c\",\"sourceScreen\":\"projects/9405789793801490511/screens/a7802cce7cf942eab9a6acc27fc6495c\",\"y\":3295,\"width\":390,\"height\":884},{\"id\":\"assets-b99c9255cc4142a98079f29b8f09f76f-1775103626573\",\"x\":-44,\"y\":-264,\"width\":960,\"height\":540,\"sourceAsset\":\"assets/b99c9255cc4142a98079f29b8f09f76f\",\"type\":\"DESIGN_SYSTEM_INSTANCE\"},{\"id\":\"b86cf7f133b0409895cc375abad6915f\",\"sourceScreen\":\"projects/9405789793801490511/screens/b86cf7f133b0409895cc375abad6915f\",\"x\":1024,\"width\":390,\"height\":884},{\"id\":\"fae7e60d8d9049cbb635de17964a64d6\",\"sourceScreen\":\"projects/9405789793801490511/screens/fae7e60d8d9049cbb635de17964a64d6\",\"x\":2386,\"width\":390,\"height\":1625}],\"metadata\":{\"userRole\":\"OWNER\"}},{\"name\":\"projects/13261989784115652519\",\"title\":\"Luxury E-commerce UI Kit\",\"visibility\":\"PRIVATE\",\"createTime\":\"2026-04-12T03:21:20.339714Z\",\"updateTime\":\"2026-04-12T06:08:24.843622Z\",\"projectType\":\"TEXT_TO_UI_PRO\",\"thumbnailScreenshot\":{\"name\":\"projects/13261989784115652519/files/8eac88e9de0244ff82dd953738f11bb8\",\"downloadUrl\":\"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida/ADBb0ujE5V0nQlZl4lfY-s3OjdTe1gMVW5GI7OnASy56DmbQvQnYPAjBax7eeHmPekjSUMbAVq5UVQWzTOzihJ78XI9xoSKRc-w_H4TKE3_W5-NNk3hO62_4ugtHjpIDvdckqqwHbL373LTpn42uvp9Nb2n340lMuFXue1CkOtXHysDxIDzJCOC7qOaZbKtzhLJiseoAXc-dQW14J4lrPHKh9xYcFCxAY_lJIBMjsReTMfi1ERgfOIS7O2JF-yVu\"},\"origin\":\"STITCH\",\"deviceType\":\"DESKTOP\",\"designTheme\":{\"colorMode\":\"LIGHT\",\"font\":\"NOTO_SERIF\",\"customColor\":\"#000000\",\"headlineFont\":\"NOTO_SERIF\",\"bodyFont\":\"MANROPE\",\"labelFont\":\"MANROPE\",\"namedColors\":{\"background\":\"#f9f9f9\",\"error\":\"#9e3f4e\",\"error_container\":\"#ff8b9a\",\"error_dim\":\"#4f0116\",\"inverse_on_surface\":\"#9c9d9d\",\"inverse_primary\":\"#ffffff\",\"inverse_surface\":\"#0c0f0f\",\"on_background\":\"#2d3435\",\"on_error\":\"#fff7f7\",\"on_error_container\":\"#782232\",\"on_primary\":\"#f8f8f8\",\"on_primary_container\":\"#525252\",\"on_primary_fixed\":\"#3f3f3f\",\"on_primary_fixed_variant\":\"#5b5b5b\",\"on_secondary\":\"#fff8ef\",\"on_secondary_container\":\"#644f00\",\"on_secondary_fixed\":\"#4e3d00\",\"on_secondary_fixed_variant\":\"#705900\",\"on_surface\":\"#2d3435\",\"on_surface_variant\":\"#5a6061\",\"on_tertiary\":\"#fbf8f8\",\"on_tertiary_container\":\"#5c5b5b\",\"on_tertiary_fixed\":\"#4a4949\",\"on_tertiary_fixed_variant\":\"#676666\",\"outline\":\"#757c7d\",\"outline_variant\":\"#adb3b4\",\"primary\":\"#5e5e5e\",\"primary_container\":\"#e2e2e2\",\"primary_dim\":\"#525252\",\"primary_fixed\":\"#e2e2e2\",\"primary_fixed_dim\":\"#d4d4d4\",\"secondary\":\"#745c00\",\"secondary_container\":\"#ffe088\",\"secondary_dim\":\"#665100\",\"secondary_fixed\":\"#ffe088\",\"secondary_fixed_dim\":\"#f8d056\",\"surface\":\"#f9f9f9\",\"surface_bright\":\"#f9f9f9\",\"surface_container\":\"#ebeeef\",\"surface_container_high\":\"#e4e9ea\",\"surface_container_highest\":\"#dde4e5\",\"surface_container_low\":\"#f2f4f4\",\"surface_container_lowest\":\"#ffffff\",\"surface_dim\":\"#d3dbdd\",\"surface_tint\":\"#5e5e5e\",\"surface_variant\":\"#dde4e5\",\"tertiary\":\"#5f5f5f\",\"tertiary_container\":\"#f6f3f2\",\"tertiary_dim\":\"#535353\",\"tertiary_fixed\":\"#f6f3f2\",\"tertiary_fixed_dim\":\"#e7e5e4\"},\"designMd\":\"```markdown\\n# Design System Document: The Cinematic Editorial\\n\\n## 1. Overview & Creative North Star: \\\"The Digital Curator\\\"\\nThis design system is not a store; it is a digital gallery. Our Creative North Star is **The Digital Curator**. We move away from the cluttered, \\\"conversion-optimized\\\" templates of standard e-commerce and toward a high-end, editorial experience that feels like a luxury coffee-table book.\\n\\nThe system breaks the \\\"template\\\" look through **Intentional Asymmetry**. Large-scale product imagery should bleed off the grid or overlap with serif typography to create a sense of depth and motion. We prioritize \\\"The Breath\\\"—generous, unencumbered whitespace—that signals to the affluent shopper that we are not in a rush to sell, but rather to present.\\n\\n## 2. Colors: Tonal Depth & The \\\"No-Line\\\" Rule\\nThe palette is rooted in deep blacks and warm, light-reflective neutrals. We use Material Design token logic to create a sophisticated, layered environment.\\n\\n### Color Tokens\\n*   **Primary (#5e5e5e):** Used for core UI logic; a refined charcoal that avoids the harshness of true black in functional elements.\\n*   **Secondary (#745c00 / Soft Gold):** Reserved exclusively for \\\"Moments of Truth\\\"—active states, premium CTA accents, or luxury signifiers.\\n*   **Surface (#f9f9f9):** Our \\\"Ivory\\\" base. It provides a warmer, more expensive feel than a clinical \\\"Pure White.\\\"\\n\\n### The \\\"No-Line\\\" Rule\\n**Prohibit 1px solid borders for sectioning.** To maintain the cinematic feel, boundaries must be defined solely through background color shifts.\\n*   Use `surface-container-low` (#f2f4f4) for secondary content sections.\\n*   Use `surface-container-highest` (#dde4e5) for utility bars or footers.\\n*   Transitions between sections should feel like the turning of a heavy, matte paper page, not a digital box.\\n\\n### The \\\"Glass & Gradient\\\" Rule\\nFor floating elements (modals, navigation overlays), utilize **Glassmorphism**. Apply `surface` colors at 80% opacity with a `20px` backdrop blur. This allows the high-end product photography to \\\"ghost\\\" through the UI, maintaining the cinematic immersion. For main CTAs, use a subtle linear gradient from `primary` to `primary_dim` to give a tactile, \\\"satin\\\" finish.\\n\\n## 3. Typography: The High-Contrast Dialogue\\nThe typography system is a dialogue between the classical (Noto Serif) and the industrial (Manrope).\\n\\n*   **Display & Headlines (Noto Serif):** These are our \\\"Voice.\\\" Used for editorial storytelling and product titles. The high-contrast serifs should be set with tight tracking (-2%) to feel like a fashion masthead.\\n*   **Body & UI (Manrope):** These are our \\\"Function.\\\" Used for descriptions and technical data. Manrope’s geometric clarity ensures legibility against complex imagery.\\n*   **Hierarchy as Identity:** \\n    *   `display-lg` (3.5rem) should be used sparingly, often overlapping image containers.\\n    *   `label-sm` (0.6875rem) in all-caps with increased letter spacing (+10%) should be used for \\\"Exclusive\\\" or \\\"Limited Edition\\\" tags.\\n\\n## 4. Elevation & Depth: Tonal Layering\\nWe reject the heavy drop-shadows of the 2010s. Depth is achieved through \\\"stacking\\\" surfaces.\\n\\n*   **The Layering Principle:** Place a `surface-container-lowest` (#ffffff) card on top of a `surface-container-low` (#f2f4f4) section. The slight shift in \\\"Ivory\\\" creates a natural, soft lift.\\n*   **Ambient Shadows:** If an element must float (e.g., a luxury cart drawer), use an extra-diffused shadow: `box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(45, 52, 53, 0.04);`. The shadow color is a tint of `on_surface`, not grey.\\n*   **The \\\"Ghost Border\\\" Fallback:** If a border is required for accessibility (e.g., input fields), use the `outline-variant` (#adb3b4) at 15% opacity. **Never use 100% opaque borders.**\\n\\n## 5. Components\\n\\n### Buttons\\n*   **Primary:** Solid `primary` (#5e5e5e) with `on_primary` (#f8f8f8) text. 0px border radius. High-padding (16px 32px) to feel expansive.\\n*   **Secondary:** Ghost style. `outline` (#757c7d) at 20% opacity. On hover, the background shifts to `surface-container-high`.\\n*   **Tertiary:** Underlined `label-md` text. The underline should be 1px and offset by 4px.\\n\\n### Inputs & Fields\\n*   **Text Inputs:** No background. Only a bottom border using `outline-variant` at 20%. The label should use `notoSerif` for a bespoke, \\\"signed\\\" feel.\\n*   **Error States:** Use `error` (#9e3f4e) for text, but never a red box. Use a subtle `error_container` (#ff8b9a) background fill at 10% opacity.\\n\\n### Cards & Lists\\n*   **Editorial Cards:** Forbid dividers. Use `surface-container` tiers to distinguish the product from the background. \\n*   **Imagery:** All cards must use a 4:5 or 1:1 aspect ratio. Images should include a subtle `0.5s` scale-up transition on hover to simulate a \\\"lens zoom.\\\"\\n\\n### Specialized Component: The \\\"Cinematic Scroller\\\"\\nA horizontal product list where the images are not clipped by a container, but fade into the `surface` color using a linear-gradient mask on the right edge. This encourages \\\"discovery\\\" rather than \\\"scrolling.\\\"\\n\\n## 6. Do's and Don'ts\\n\\n### Do\\n*   **Do** use asymmetrical margins (e.g., 10% left, 15% right) for hero sections to break the \\\"web\\\" feel.\\n*   **Do** use \\\"Warm White\\\" (#FDFDFD) for text on dark backgrounds to avoid eye strain.\\n*   **Do** ensure all interactions (hovers, fades) have a duration of at least `400ms` with an `ease-in-out` curve to feel \\\"heavy\\\" and expensive.\\n\\n### Don't\\n*   **Don't** use standard 4px or 8px border-radii. This system is **Strict 0px (Square)**. Luxury is sharp and intentional.\\n*   **Don't** use \\\"Sale Red.\\\" Use `secondary_fixed` (Soft Gold) for promotions.\\n*   **Don't** use icon-only buttons. Affluence expects clear, curated labeling. Always accompany icons with a `label-sm` text element.\\n*   **Don't** use divider lines to separate list items. Use the spacing scale (`24px` or `32px` gaps) to let the content breathe.```\",\"colorVariant\":\"NEUTRAL\",\"overridePrimaryColor\":\"#000000\",\"overrideSecondaryColor\":\"#D4AF37\",\"overrideTertiaryColor\":\"#333333\",\"overrideNeutralColor\":\"#FDFDFD\",\"spacingScale\":3},\"screenInstances\":[{\"id\":\"8c9d0982820e4ae595f67351cb9a64ce\",\"sourceScreen\":\"projects/13261989784115652519/screens/8c9d0982820e4ae595f67351cb9a64ce\",\"x\":3712,\"width\":1280,\"height\":5024},{\"id\":\"90b02627a325484f845073e4815fb552\",\"sourceScreen\":\"projects/13261989784115652519/screens/90b02627a325484f845073e4815fb552\",\"x\":7744,\"width\":1280,\"height\":2028},{\"id\":\"ad2b64b932fb4b7980ef450ef3ac6db9\",\"sourceScreen\":\"projects/13261989784115652519/screens/ad2b64b932fb4b7980ef450ef3ac6db9\",\"x\":6400,\"width\":1280,\"height\":2095},{\"id\":\"assets-40e982ef8dfb4af2ab0af498ef8cfff6-1775964104766\",\"width\":960,\"height\":540,\"sourceAsset\":\"assets/40e982ef8dfb4af2ab0af498ef8cfff6\",\"type\":\"DESIGN_SYSTEM_INSTANCE\"},{\"id\":\"cf13932445dd4ceeb7a0a9b9834ea7b0\",\"sourceScreen\":\"projects/13261989784115652519/screens/cf13932445dd4ceeb7a0a9b9834ea7b0\",\"x\":1024,\"width\":1280,\"height\":1989},{\"id\":\"e283104138994d29b2075d9ccc937c7b\",\"sourceScreen\":\"projects/13261989784115652519/screens/e283104138994d29b2075d9ccc937c7b\",\"x\":5056,\"width\":1280,\"height\":1024},{\"id\":\"e75ed29a22d249a5bc79a96ad663b95f\",\"sourceScreen\":\"projects/13261989784115652519/screens/e75ed29a22d249a5bc79a96ad663b95f\",\"x\":2368,\"width\":1280,\"height\":3214}],\"metadata\":{\"userRole\":\"OWNER\"}},{\"name\":\"projects/12787592388419277796\",\"title\":\"Luxury E-Commerce App\",\"visibility\":\"PRIVATE\",\"createTime\":\"2026-04-12T05:51:33.413371Z\",\"updateTime\":\"2026-04-12T06:06:03.566582Z\",\"projectType\":\"PROJECT_DESIGN\",\"thumbnailScreenshot\":{\"name\":\"projects/12787592388419277796/files/a4e7a9e949d64f7cac3f25d2629858d1\",\"downloadUrl\":\"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida/ADBb0uhhyvMxPmoTSSFfi_5heezdf47VP1tTkQBMF3FV1d35NQyYJui0EnauvMfi82nDKdzxemd1kzr4sqmN9kZ9XIle0ri2MOEVTD00F-kz_JhRd5B6pLfD3x5p9vL2jguE7DhhRJCdO2Be-A0rUgtPuIfkqCH3vxLtepCbeT1Q6f9cXiNrqrgTL-0ONt-AvUWVEJvglV_5JWKBZfMxXrWSPTnx5UaVgA_A6c7dgx-T8rLUfBZgU0j_tUPTMxc\"},\"origin\":\"STITCH\",\"deviceType\":\"MOBILE\",\"designTheme\":{\"colorMode\":\"LIGHT\",\"font\":\"NOTO_SERIF\",\"customColor\":\"#0B0B0C\",\"headlineFont\":\"NOTO_SERIF\",\"bodyFont\":\"INTER\",\"labelFont\":\"INTER\",\"namedColors\":{\"background\":\"#fbf9f5\",\"error\":\"#ba1a1a\",\"error_container\":\"#ffdad6\",\"inverse_on_surface\":\"#f2f0ed\",\"inverse_primary\":\"#c8c6c7\",\"inverse_surface\":\"#30312e\",\"on_background\":\"#1b1c1a\",\"on_error\":\"#ffffff\",\"on_error_container\":\"#93000a\",\"on_primary\":\"#ffffff\",\"on_primary_container\":\"#858384\",\"on_primary_fixed\":\"#1c1b1c\",\"on_primary_fixed_variant\":\"#474647\",\"on_secondary\":\"#ffffff\",\"on_secondary_container\":\"#775f2f\",\"on_secondary_fixed\":\"#261900\",\"on_secondary_fixed_variant\":\"#584416\",\"on_surface\":\"#1b1c1a\",\"on_surface_variant\":\"#46464a\",\"on_tertiary\":\"#ffffff\",\"on_tertiary_container\":\"#858387\",\"on_tertiary_fixed\":\"#1b1b1e\",\"on_tertiary_fixed_variant\":\"#47464a\",\"outline\":\"#77777b\",\"outline_variant\":\"#c7c6ca\",\"primary\":\"#000000\",\"primary_container\":\"#1c1b1c\",\"primary_fixed\":\"#e5e2e3\",\"primary_fixed_dim\":\"#c8c6c7\",\"secondary\":\"#725b2c\",\"secondary_container\":\"#fcdca0\",\"secondary_fixed\":\"#ffdea3\",\"secondary_fixed_dim\":\"#e1c389\",\"surface\":\"#fbf9f5\",\"surface_bright\":\"#fbf9f5\",\"surface_container\":\"#efeeea\",\"surface_container_high\":\"#eae8e4\",\"surface_container_highest\":\"#e4e2de\",\"surface_container_low\":\"#f5f3ef\",\"surface_container_lowest\":\"#ffffff\",\"surface_dim\":\"#dbdad6\",\"surface_tint\":\"#5f5e5f\",\"surface_variant\":\"#e4e2de\",\"tertiary\":\"#000000\",\"tertiary_container\":\"#1b1b1e\",\"tertiary_fixed\":\"#e4e1e5\",\"tertiary_fixed_dim\":\"#c8c6ca\"},\"designMd\":\"# Design System Specification\\n\\n## 1. Overview & Creative North Star: \\\"The Digital Atelier\\\"\\n\\nThe Creative North Star for this design system is **The Digital Atelier**. Unlike standard e-commerce platforms that prioritize density and \\\"conversion hacking,\\\" this system treats the digital screen as a physical gallery space. It is rooted in the concept of *restrained luxury*—where what is left out is as important as what is included.\\n\\nTo break the \\\"template\\\" look, we move away from rigid, boxed-in layouts in favor of **Intentional Asymmetry** and **Editorial Flow**. We prioritize the \\\"breathing room\\\" of a high-end fashion magazine, using wide margins and overlapping elements to create a sense of bespoke craftsmanship. Every interaction must feel like an invitation, not a transaction.\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 2. Colors: Tonal Depth & The \\\"No-Line\\\" Rule\\n\\nThe palette is a sophisticated interplay of deep blacks and warm, organic whites. We do not use color to \\\"pop\\\"; we use it to direct focus with quiet authority.\\n\\n### Color Tokens\\n- **Primary (`#000000` / `primary`):** Absolute authority. Used for core branding and high-impact CTAs.\\n- **Secondary (`#725b2c` / `secondary`):** Our soft gold accent. To be used sparingly—like fine jewelry on a minimalist outfit.\\n- **Surfaces:**\\n    - `surface`: `#fbf9f5` (The warm canvas)\\n    - `surface_container_low`: `#f5f3ef`\\n    - `surface_container`: `#efeeea`\\n    - `surface_dim`: `#dbdad6`\\n- **Inverse Surface (`#30312e` / `inverse_surface`):** Our charcoal for high-contrast dark modes or specific editorial sections.\\n\\n### The \\\"No-Line\\\" Rule\\n**Explicit Instruction:** Designers are prohibited from using 1px solid borders to section content. Boundaries must be defined solely through background color shifts. A `surface_container_low` section sitting on a `surface` background provides enough distinction for a luxury eye.\\n\\n### Surface Hierarchy & Nesting\\nTreat the UI as stacked sheets of fine, heavy-weight paper.\\n- **Base Layer:** `surface`\\n- **Inner Content/Product Cards:** `surface_container_lowest` (White) to create a subtle \\\"lift\\\" against the warm canvas.\\n- **Sidebar/Navigation:** `surface_container_high` to provide structural grounding.\\n\\n### Signature Textures\\nFor hero CTAs or primary navigation headers, use a subtle **Linear Gradient** transitioning from `primary` (#000000) to `primary_container` (#1C1B1C). This prevents the black from feeling \\\"dead\\\" on screen, giving it a velvety, tactile depth.\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. Typography: The Editorial Voice\\n\\nWe utilize a high-contrast pairing: the intellectual heritage of **Cormorant Garamond** (Serif) against the modern, functional clarity of **Inter*

# 2026-04-19 - Stitch Design Agent Bootstrapped
